sections.sectionTitle: Efraim leh Manasseh a Kipia Gam

verses.text: Josef' suanlekhakte' tanh gamgi pen Jerikho luite' nisuahna lam, Jerikho kiang Jordan panin sehnel gamah pai a, Jerikho panin mualtung gamte tawnin Bethel-ah paito hi
Tua ciangin Bethel panin Luz-ah pai-in, Arkhi mite gam Ataroth nawk hi
Tua ciangin nitumna lam Jaflet mite' gam lam Bethhoron a niam lam gam ciangdongah paisuk hi. Tua ciangin Gezer-ah pai-in tuipi-ah tawp hi
Josef' suan Manasseh, leh Efraim mite in amau' gamhluah dingin hih gamte ngah uh hi
Amau' behbehin Efraim mite' gam pen a nuai-a bang ahi hi: Nisuahna lamah amau' gamgi pen Atarothaddar pan Bethhoron tungnung ciang ahi hi
Tua panin tuipi ciangah a gamgi pai a, leilu lamah Mikmethath ahi hi. Tua ciangin nisuahna lam a gamgi Taanathshiloh lamah kual pai-in, nisuahna lam galah pai-in Janoah a tung hi
Janoah panin Ataroth leh Naarah-ah paisuk a, Jerikho banin Jordan-ah tawp hi
Tappuah panin nitumna lam Kanah lui-ah gamgi pai-in tuipi-ah tawp hi. Hih pen amau' behbehin Efraim minamte' gamhluah hi a
Manasseh mite' gamhluah sung panin Efraim mite-a' dingin a kikhenkhia khuapite, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi
Ahi zongin amaute in Gezer sunga teng Kanaan mite hawlkhialo uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin tuni dongin Kanaan mite pen Efraim mite lakah teng a, ahih hangin aana nasep a sem dingin sal a suak uh hi.
